creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
Version 1.3.0 of the audacious-plugins port didn't play FLAC
	files. The reason stated in the port was that the FLAC port on
	FreeBSD was too old. This turns out not to be the
	case. Audacious-plugins contains it's own copy of the FLAC library,
	so it doesn't rely on the FLAC port at all. But the compilation of
	this library was b0rken because it didn't reference the FLAC
	include files when building in src/flac/plugin_common. The patch
	I've added fixes this.

Fix: Apply the following patch to the port:
--------------- audacious-plugins fix FLAC patch ---------------
How-To-Repeat: 	Try building audacious-plugins with FLAC support.
